001.text: You declined to be verified. Verification is required to use Tessera.

002.text: Stripe does not support verification for users under the age of majority.

003.text: Your country is not currently supported for identity verification.

101.text: The document you provided has expired. Please use a valid, current document.

102.text: We couldn't verify your document. Please ensure it's clear and try again.

103.text: That document type isn't accepted. Please use a passport, driver's license, or national ID card.

201.text: Your document didn't contain a photo. Please use a photo ID.

202.text: The selfie didn't match the face on your document. Please try again in good lighting.

203.text: We couldn't verify your selfie. Please try again in good lighting.

204.text: The selfie image appeared to be manipulated and cannot be accepted.

301.text: We couldn't verify your ID number.

302.text: Your document didn't contain enough data to complete verification.

303.text: The information provided didn't match our records.

401.text: The address provided didn't match our records.

900.text: Verification failed. Please try again or contact support.

901.text: You have exceeded the maximum number of verification attempts. Please contact support to resolve this issue.

902.text: Verification session not found or has expired. Please start over.

903.text: Verification is still being processed. Please wait a moment and try again.

904.text: Failed to initialize verification session. Please try again.

905.text: Unable to start verification. Please try again or contact support.
